data.title: Applied Optoelectronics to Present at the Needham Technology, Media, & Consumer Conference
data.description: In Sugar Land, Texas on April 29, 2026, Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI), a prominent supplier of cutting-edge optical and HFC networking solutions for AI applications, revealed that AOI's management is scheduled to participate in a fireside chat at an upcoming investor conference.

data.title: The Hanover Reports Record First Quarter Net Income and Operating Income of $5.20 and $5.25 per Diluted Share, Respectively; Record Net and Operating Return on Equity of 20.9% and 20.3%, Respectively
data.description: In the first quarter, there were notable achievements with a combined ratio of 91.7%. Excluding catastrophes, the combined ratio stood at 85.4%. Catastrophe losses amounted to $98.9 million, representing 6.3 percentage points of the combined ratio. Net premiums written grew by 3.2%. Additionally, there were renewal price increases of 8.6% in Core Commercial and 8.4% in Personal lines.

data.title: Flowserve Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Flowserve Corporation (NYSE: FLS), a top player in flow control products and services for global infrastructure markets, released its financial results for Q1 ending March 31, 2026. Key figures included $1.15 billion in total bookings for the quarter, comprised of over $110 million in nuclear bookings and $680 million in aftermarket bookings. The Q1 operating margin was 11.2%, down by 30 basis points, while the adjusted operating margin stood at 15.1%, marking a growth of 230 basis points.

data.title: RxSight, Inc. to Present at the Bank of America Healthcare Conference
data.description: RxSight, Inc. from Aliso Viejo, California, revealed their participation in the upcoming Bank of America Healthcare Conference on April 29, 2026. The management team is set to engage in a fireside chat on May 13, 2026, at 3:00 p.m. Pacific Time. Those interested can access a live and archived webcast of the presentation on the company’s investor relations website at https://investors.rxsight.com/.

data.title: RED ROBIN GOURMET BURGERS, INC. APPOINTS MARK GRAFF AS CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado on April 29, 2026, Red Robin Gourmet Burgers, Inc. disclosed the appointment of Mark Graff as the new Chief Financial Officer, set to start on May 4. Graff will be taking over from Chris Meyer, who assumed the role of Interim Chief Financial Officer in December. Red Robin operates under the NASDAQ symbol RRGB.

data.title: DoubleVerify to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: On April 29, 2026, DoubleVerify ("DV") (NYSE: DV), a prominent software platform for digital media measurement, data, and analytics, shared that Mark Zagorski, CEO, and/or Nicola Allais, CFO, will be speaking at upcoming investor conferences.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: INR) of Morgantown, W.Va., is set to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial and operational performance on May 12, 2026, post-market closure. A conference call is scheduled for May 13, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET for a detailed discussion on these results. To join the call, interested individuals can register at https://events.q4inc.com/analyst/805823647?pwd=C2fZN5eO or dial +1 585 542 9983 (U.S. Lo).

data.title: Equinix Declares Quarterly Dividend on Its Common Stock
data.description: Equinix, Inc., a leading digital infrastructure company based in Redwood City, California, revealed on April 29, 2026, that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $5.16 per share for its common stock. This dividend declaration highlights the company's commitment to maximizing shareholder value and sustaining its financial health. Equinix, Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol EQIX and continues to demonstrate its robust performance in the digital infrastructure sector.

data.title: LifeStance to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: On April 29, 2026, LifeStance Health Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: LFST), a prominent outpatient mental healthcare provider based in Scottsdale, Arizona, revealed its participation in upcoming investor conferences. LifeStance Health Group is known as one of the major players in the field and the company is scheduled to present at these conferences to discuss its operations and strategies with potential investors. This move indicates the company's proactive approach to engaging with stakeholders and potentially attracting new investments.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Brio Italian Grille/
data.description: Celebrate Mother's Day in true Italian fashion at Brio Italian Grille this year! On April 29, 2026, Brio Italian Grille announced updates to their Mother's Day offerings. The event promises to be a memorable experience, with special menu items and gifts for mothers. Make sure to reserve your spot soon as there will be limited availability. For more information or to make a reservation, contact Brio Italian Grille at [contact information]. Don't miss out on this opportunity to treat Mom to a delicious meal and show her your appreciation!

data.title: Camping World Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), based in Lincolnshire, Illinois, and known as America's Largest Recreational Vehicle Dealer, disclosed its first-quarter outcomes for the period concluding on March 31, 2026. Matthew Wagner, the Chief Executive Officer and President of CWH, expressed contentment with the results given the prevailing conditions in the RV sector. Although there was a setback in used RV sales in January, the company managed to deliver promising performance overall.

data.title: Mattel Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Toy company Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) based in El Segundo, California, announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026. CEO Ynon Kreiz expressed satisfaction with the company's performance, noting a growth in Net Sales and strong consumer demand for their products during the quarter. Mattel is focused on expanding its IP-driven play and family entertainment business, with noticeable top-line acceleration in the current second quarter. Progress is also being made in their digital strategy.

data.title: FCPT Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results
data.description: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. based in Mill Valley, California, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company, listed as FCPT on the NYSE, reported a positive start to the year. Following successful efforts in 2025, including raising a record amount of liquidity and reducing leverage, FCPT secured a $200 million Term Loan at a favorable rate for investing in new opportunities. CEO Bill Lene highlighted the company's strong position and strategic financial moves, aiming to capitalize on the investment pipeline with loan terms that offer significant advantages over historical acquisition yields.

data.title: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. (Nasdaq: SFM) released their quarterly results for the 13-week period ending March 29, 2026, in Phoenix. CEO Jack Sinclair stated that the first quarter unfolded according to expectations. The company is concentrating on enhancing customer interaction, foraging, and discovery, alongside fortifying their supply chain and increasing the availability of nutritious food. They are optimistic about their future prospects and anticipate growth in the upcoming quarters.

data.title: Tenable Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Tenable has surpassed revenue and profit expectations for the first quarter, with figures surpassing initial projections. As a result, the company has decided to revise its full-year outlook upwards. The positive performance in Q1 has led to increased confidence in Tenable's ability to achieve strong financial results for the rest of the year. The exact revenue and profit numbers have not been disclosed, but the strong showing in the first quarter has prompted a reevaluation of expectations for the entire fiscal year. This indicates that Tenable is on track for a successful year financially.
